steps.title: Identify what the corpus empirically tests
steps.content: The passage shows how corpora measure empirical properties of words, demonstrating by finding that “world” is the eighth most commonly used noun. The blank must name a measurable quality of how a word is present across language.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the context
steps.content: Pervasive (widely present, prevalent) directly captures the measurable frequency and prevalence of a word across spoken and written English. The other three describe unrelated properties that corpus analysis cannot measure. That matches choice A — A is correct.
